description: Detection rate for each paraphraser when it was randomly selected as the duplicate source.
analysis: Detection rates vary significantly across paraphrasers. Llama-3.1-8B: 25% (6/24) Gemini-2.5-Flash: 64% (18/28) GPT-5-Nano: 100% (36/36) DIPPER: 43% (20/47). DIPPER, as a T5-based non-LLM paraphraser, tends to produce outputs with distinct stylistic markers (shorter length, more literal substitutions) compared to LLM-based paraphrasers, which may make it either easier or harder to detect depending on the source text.
